creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Starting with version 122, Firefox supports passkeys. Since the FreeBSD port of Firefox is at version 124, I attempted to create a demo key at https://www.passkeys.io/.

To ensure that my configuration was not problematic or that no extensions were interfering, I created a new profile using the command:

$ firefox --new-instance --ProfileManager

At passkeys.io, I attempted to create a passkey but was unsuccessful. I did not receive a prompt when choosing "Create passkey." What is currently preventing Firefox on FreeBSD from using passkeys?
